## Overview
Brief description of the roadmap item.

## Goals
What are the main goals of this feature/improvement?

## Timeline
Expected timeline or milestone for completion:
- [ ] Phase 1: Planning & Design
- [ ] Phase 2: Development
- [ ] Phase 3: Testing
- [ ] Phase 4: Release

## Resources
What resources are needed to complete this?

## Dependencies
Any dependencies on other features or external factors?

## Status
- [ ] Not Started
- [ ] In Progress
- [ ] Completed
- [ ] On Hold
